summary: Comprehensive testing of Crowd Services Platform backend APIs and frontend UI completed. Most functionality working correctly with Arabic RTL interface.

minor_bugs.impact: Health check endpoint not accessible, but core functionality works

ui_bugs.issue: Timeout when trying to click sidebar elements - may be invisible or protected

passed_tests: Admin login with identifier field and access_token response
Dashboard operations room with KPIs, heatmap, smart alerts, and charts
Admin panel with KPI cards and recommendations
Field worker page with density input (4 levels) and alert form (4 types)
API GET /api/dashboard/ops returns complete data structure
API GET /api/smart-alerts returns smart alerts array
API GET /api/employees/{id}/profile returns employee profile data
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix health endpoint 404 issue and investigate sidebar navigation visibility/accessibility. Both are minor issues and don't impact core functionality.
success_percentage: Backend: 87.5% (7/8 tests passed), Frontend: 89% (8/9 tests passed)
